name: Discrete Mathematics
description: This subject covers the study of mathematical structures that are fundamentally discrete rather than continuous.

name: Theory of Computation
description: This subject deals with the study of abstract machines and computational problems.

name: Computer Network
description: This subject focuses on the study of data communication and computer networking.

name: Database Management System
description: This subject covers the study of managing and organizing data in a database.

name: C Programming
description: This subject involves learning the C programming language and its applications.

name: Digital Logic
description: This subject focuses on the study of digital circuits and logic gates.

name: Operating System
description: This subject covers the study of computer operating systems and their components.

name: Computer Organization & Architecture
description: This subject involves the study of the structure and organization of computer systems.

name: Data Structure
description: This subject covers the study of data organization and efficient algorithms.

name: Aptitude
description: This subject involves testing the problem-solving and reasoning skills of individuals.

name: Engineering Mathematics
description: This subject covers the study of mathematical concepts and their applications in engineering.

name: Compiler Design
description: This subject covers the study of designing and building a compiler.

name: Algorithms
description: This subject covers the study of designing and building algorithms.
